marketingassetTab.welcomeMessage: Welcome to our Marketing Assets page! Here, you'll find everything you need to help promote our platform and invite others to join our community.
marketingassetTab.WheneveryouuseourassetsMEssage: Whenever you use our assets, please give credit to our brand.
marketingassetTab.feelfreeMessage: Feel free to customize our graphics, but ensure they align with our brand guidelines.
marketingassetTab.encourageMessage: Encourage your audience to visit our platform by sharing your content and tagging us on social media!
marketingassetTab.forhelpingusgrowourcommunity: for helping us grow our community!
marketingassetTab.haveanyquestionsMessage: If you have any questions about using our assets or need additional materials, don’t hesitate to reach out! Contact us at
